warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Pass Throughs
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Band Row Rotate Press
Banded Lat Stretch
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Cossack Squat
5e/s Squat Knee Taps
10 Broad Jump
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
3 Full Clean

strength.name: Tall Clean
strength.description:
1x3 | *From Triple Extension, drop under the bar
*Fast Elbows | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3

strength.name: Clean Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * 3 count to knee
* Focus on hip pop & Triple Extension
* Shrug and let elbows float | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
06:00 3
08:00 3
10:00 3

strength.name: Clean
strength.description:
1x1 | * If you catch high, squat it
* Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | 24min
BUILD 4 Sets E3MOM
00:00 3 @ 60%
03:00 2 @ 70%
06:00 1 @ 80%
09:00 1 @ 90%
12:00 1 @ 95%
15:00-25:00 1RM Attempts

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
E3MOM X 4
200m Run
6 Power Cleans @ 60/40
8 Bar Facing Burpees
rest in remaining time
Score fastest round

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today taxes quads, shoulders, and pull heavily; address posterior chain and horizontal pulling to balance.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Tall Clean, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 1 by 1 at 95 percent. Metcon: EMOM: 200m Run, 6 Power Cleans @ 60/40, 8 Bar Facing Burpees. For hypertrophy, focus on back (horizontal), glutes, triceps.
